description:
Run daily pipeline for 2026-03-06. Follow agents/marc_pipeline.md step by step.

Sequence:
1. Scout: Run `python3 scripts/scout.py --raw --compact` to collect fresh data, then analyze and produce data/scout_report_20260306.json
2. Validate scout report: `python3 scripts/validate.py scout data/scout_report_20260306.json`
3. Strategist: Read scout report, produce data/strategy_20260306.json
4. Validate strategy: `python3 scripts/validate.py strategy data/strategy_20260306.json`
5. Creator EN: Read strategy, produce data/content_plan_20260306_EN.json
6. Creator JP: Read strategy, produce data/content_plan_20260306_JP.json (run EN and JP in parallel)
7. Validate both content plans
8. War Room: Score all draft posts, rank them, produce war room results
9. Generate Telegram preview message with all posts for human approval
10. Send preview to operator via telegram_send.py

Date: 2026-03-06. Both EN and JP accounts. Output all files to data/ directory.
notes: Operator wants full pipeline with War Room scoring and content preview for approval. Follow marc_pipeline.md exactly. Note: we already have scout data from today (scout_raw_20260306.json, scout_compact_20260306.json) — check if it can be reused or if fresh collection is needed.
